authority: CAMPAIGN_BRIEF_algebra_arm_DRAFT.md §10 RATIFIED 2026-06-14 (Will) + recon scratch/warp_stage0_recon/ (build-vs-consult verdicts) + geometry-arm successor notes (R15 inheritance)

execution.byte_stability: every battery x2; sha256 over records (Stage A+); Stage 0 = the frozen manifest sha
execution.imports: probe/substrate stdlib only (fractions); referee exact-ℚ via the commuted-tree path; mpmath referee-side only (transcendental enclosures, Stage A) — NOT imported at Stage 0
execution.membrane_rule: RESULT_TYPES Amendment 1: private float algebra, a byte-stable event accumulator (the ledger), one WarpRecord boundary object; role gate in the schema
execution.three_roles: probe (d_static/d_dynamic) never imports the referee (referee.py); enforced by the import-seam test (covenant #7)

fixtures.pathology: depth-2 product of sum and difference; all maps R_exact
expansion with internal cancellation; still all R_exact
division present but away from the ÷0 locus
intrinsic ÷0 token; the organ must return indeterminate
intrinsic 0^neg token; indeterminate, never a wrong factors
UNDERFLOW-WITNESS-ULP (HR138, banked): total float cancellation, factors by R_exact-by-composition
separated_coincidental cousin: two routes coincide at TRUE 0; factors (CL-M4 finite-precision cousin, reproduced not banked)
fixtures.sexpr: (sub (mul (add x y) (add x y)) (add (add (pow x 2) (pow y 2)) (mul 2 (mul x y))))

fixtures.pathology: Richardson wall: D_static does_not_factor; factors only after one simplification-oracle call (CL-W3, Stage A)
Richardson wall: on-branch inverse pair (|x| < pi/2)
Jacobian ℚⁿˣᵐ (2x2; Arm M reuse); entrywise additive
make-or-break Q2 edge: additive residue is representative-dependent (ill-defined on the quotient); Möbius/PGL2 is the named native reconstruction; equality by cross-multiply a·d==b·c

kill_conditions.K-W1: HALT (campaign dies): any pure-R_exact rational-op DAG (away from ÷0/0^neg) that D_dynamic finds does NOT factor. The decidable-core foundational claim is false; the campaign stops, chain preserved.
kill_conditions.K-W2: HALT (arm): D_static != D_dynamic on the rational-op class in either direction (a false verdict). The decider is broken; the arm halts.
kill_conditions.K-W3: REFUTE-ROW (continue — the make-or-break): CL-W5 fails — either additive ⊕ DOES descend on ℙ¹, or a free ℚ-module carrier fails additive in CL-W4. Halt the row, preserve the witness, name what reconstructs instead, reduce scope, keep the chain.
kill_conditions.K-W4: REFUTE-ROW: CL-W3 — the D_static/D_dynamic split does NOT coincide with expression-equality (the wall is located elsewhere than predicted).
kill_conditions.K-W5: DESCOPE (pre-declared): the ℙ¹/PGL₂ parent build or a quotient extension exceeds the Stage-0 budget -> fence per the pre-registered schedule, never silently.

recorded_non_tests.FX-W-F/multiplicative_relative_error: a multiplicative-relative-error cell cannot fire the refutation kill — the exact EFT residue of any rational op is additive by construction. Recorded, not tested.

rulings_applied.CL_W5_grading: additive-failure half [ANALYTIC] (foregone on ℙ¹); measured weight on the Möbius reconstruction (§10.5)
rulings_applied.R15_inheritance: below_detection = R_exact-by-composition, NOT a T_token; prereg inherits it (§10.7, binding)
rulings_applied.charter_home: results/the_warp/ (Stages a/b); charter row OPEN until both arms close (§10.2)
rulings_applied.dstatic_reuse: D_static lifts the AtomKind partition (partial_wrap), NOT the manifest-lineage walk (recon Q2; §10.5)
rulings_applied.naming: working label only (F14); no name adopted in-campaign
rulings_applied.oracle: exactly one declared, Rule-1.9-pinned, referee-side-only algebraic-simplification call (CL-W3); never substrate (§10.5)
rulings_applied.ordering: geometry-close gate satisfied (HR138 ratified); WARP proceeds (§10.1)
rulings_applied.scope_cap: ℙ¹(ℚ) the sole representative quotient; n=2/3 free-module carriers; carrier stores raw (num,den), referee judges equality by cross-multiply a·d==b·c (§10.5)

spine_fence: SPINE FENCE (brief §9; the manifest's verbatim fence, carried). This arm MEASURES factorability and the ⊕-carrier on named fixtures. It carries NO claim that the coupling/account primitive is the universal substrate spine, and NO cross-domain G-claim. [INFERENCE] (cella-as-trunk) stays [INFERENCE]. WARP closing satisfies the ALGEBRA-ARM HALF of the charter only — it is NOT the last gate to the spine; the unfence is a charter-level disposition reserved to Will, and requires BOTH arms to survive AND a separate spine-confirmation (SPINE_STATUS.md HR138). Eval-tier only; no substrate promotion in-campaign (Rule 1.2).

carrier_informativeness_control_fails.lesson: cross-multiply certifies [1:2]==[2:4], but the additive residue between representatives differs — ⊕_add is ill-defined on ℙ¹ (CL-W5 foregone [ANALYTIC] half)
carrier_informativeness_control_fails.naive_assumption: additive residue well-defined on the quotient

informativeness_control_fails.lesson: the float lane reads 0.0 from total cancellation; only the EFT residue recovers TRUE — factorability != float-lane exactness (CL-W2; HR138 UNDERFLOW-WITNESS-ULP, R15)

thesis: a computation inherits Cella's coherence IFF it factors into observation maps each whose defect lies in R_exact and composes (Q1, decidable in advance on the rational-op class, semi-decidable past the Richardson wall); and ⊕ is additive exactly over free ℚ-module carriers, stopping at quotient carriers (Q2; the make-or-break edge is ℙ¹(ℚ)).
